creator: johalun0@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #3)

It was about time to update world anyways so good that I got a reason to do it. So, with world and kernel in sync (r346791) I don't see the problem anymore. Not sure what actually fixed it, emacs reinstall, reboot or update world... Filesystem is ZFS by the way and truss showed that it seemed to be stuck doing fstatat() on various files in my home folder. I did not do any deliberate changes to my home folder from when it was not working to when it was working.
